master.prompt: Create an image for Tellery, a premium interactive storytelling app. The image belongs to the story “O Quadro Trocado”, an elegant Brazilian-inspired literary mystery set inside Galeria Sereno, a small prestigious art gallery, on the morning of a private viewing after a prized original painting has been secretly swapped for a convincing forgery. Art direction: premium cinematic editorial illustration, semi-realistic digital painting, refined adult mystery, intimate literary atmosphere, sophisticated but calm, inquisitive rather than frightening, not scary. The visual tone should feel like an interactive short story or a prestige streaming mystery, not like a traditional game. Setting identity: Galeria Sereno is an elegant small art gallery with long white walls, directional spotlights, polished pale wood floors, heavy gilded frames, dark mahogany accents, and a refined Brazilian urban gallery mood. Color palette: deep teal #1B3A3A, dark navy #14222E, aged gold #B8923A, warm gold #C49A4A, ivory #F2EBD8, pale wood #E5D9C2, mahogany brown #3E2418, slate gray shadows #3A3A3D, warm spotlight glow #D9A84A. Lighting: warm directional spotlights, cinematic low-light, soft golden highlights on gilded frames, deep but elegant teal and navy shadows, subtle reflections on polished floors, gentle depth falloff. Style: refined, polished, modern, premium, adult, literary, cinematic, semi-realistic, soft depth of field, subtle film grain, elegant composition, believable materials, emotionally grounded realism. Recurring motifs: gilded picture frames, canvas texture, directional spotlights, easels, paint brushes and pigments, art transport crates, white gallery walls, magnifying loupes, restoration tools. Avoid horror, gore, blood, weapons, police crime-scene aesthetics, skulls, monsters, childish illustration, cartoon style, anime, fantasy RPG visuals, game UI, neon cyberpunk, text overlays, logos, and watermarks.

cover.prompt: Create a wide cinematic cover image for the interactive mystery story “O Quadro Trocado”. Show the interior of Galeria Sereno, a small elegant art gallery, early on a quiet morning. The main focus is a large gilded frame on the longest white wall: it now holds a painting that is almost, but not quite, the original — a copy made by someone who knew the work intimately. Under a single warm directional spotlight, the texture of the paint looks slightly off and the varnish, hastily applied, still catches the light unevenly. Around the gallery: polished pale wood floors, a dark mahogany bench, other framed works softly blurred in the background, and a discreet brass plaque that may read “Galeria Sereno” only if it renders cleanly and naturally. Composition: wide horizontal hero-card framing for a mobile storytelling app. Place the framed painting slightly right of center. Leave darker atmospheric negative space on the left side for future app title and CTA overlay, but do not render any text overlay. Use the depth of the gallery behind the frame to create atmosphere, with softly blurred works and spotlights. No people in the foreground. Mood: refined, calm, inquisitive, literary, quietly mysterious, inviting.

thumbnail.prompt: Create a cinematic close-up thumbnail for the interactive mystery story “O Quadro Trocado”. Show a corner of a heavy gilded picture frame with a patch of canvas inside, lit by a warm directional spotlight. The paint on the canvas is almost right but subtly wrong, and the varnish, hastily applied, still looks tacky and uneven, catching the light in a way the original never would. A single fingerprint or brush hesitation may be visible in the wet paint. Composition: square close-up still life, the framed canvas corner dominates the frame, strong focal hierarchy, shallow depth of field, high contrast between warm gold leaf and ivory paint. The image should remain instantly readable as “something is off with this painting” even at small mobile thumbnail size. Mood: refined, quiet, suspicious, elegant, literary.

sala_principal.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Sala principal” inside Galeria Sereno. Show the long main exhibition room: white walls, polished pale wood floors, and directional spotlights. On the longest wall, a heavy gilded frame holds a painting that is the focus of the scene — a copy, though it almost passes for the original. Near the hinges of the frame, a faint gleam of recent handling catches the light, as if the back of the frame was opened during the night. A dark mahogany bench sits in the center of the room. Composition: the framed painting on the wall is the clear focal point, centered slightly off-axis, with enough surrounding gallery context to establish the location. Mood: quiet, suspicious, refined, investigative. Important visual clues: framed painting on the wall, recent handling marks on the frame hinges, spotlight, white gallery walls, polished floor.

atelier.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Atelier de restauração” inside Galeria Sereno. Show a narrow back room used by the gallery’s restorer: wooden workbenches covered with small pots of paint, brushes, magnifying loupes, cloths stained with pigment, and a soft green felt mat. At the back, leaning against the wall, a wooden art transport crate sits in a position that looks slightly out of place, as if it was moved and put back in haste. A single warm desk lamp lights the workspace, while the rest of the room fades into soft teal and brown shadows. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot with the workbench clearly visible, the misplaced crate noticeable enough to function as a clue, but not overly dramatic. Mood: orderly, focused, refined, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: workbench, paints and brushes, misplaced transport crate, desk lamp, green felt mat.

quadro_falso.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Quadro na parede”, the central clue in the mystery. Show a corner of the painting now hanging in the gilded frame on the gallery wall, lit by a warm directional spotlight. The paint is almost right, but a careful look reveals a slightly nervous brushstroke and a tiny divergence in the shadows. The varnish, hastily applied, is still tacky in places and catches the light unevenly. The gilded frame around it is heavy and ornate. Composition: close-up still life, the framed canvas dominates the frame, with paint texture, varnish sheen, and gilded leaf clearly visible. Mood: intimate, suspicious, elegant, important, quiet wrongness.

moldura.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Moldura do Vertigem”. Show the heavy dark-wood and gilded-brass frame of the painting, focusing on its hinges that allow the back to be opened and the canvas removed. On the hinges, fresh handling marks catch the warm spotlight, suggesting the back was opened with care and haste during the night. Composition: square close-up still life, the hinges and gilded edge of the frame are the clear focal point, with the ivory canvas edge and warm spotlight reflections around it. Mood: ordinary but important, investigative, refined, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: heavy gilded frame, brass hinges, recent handling marks, spotlight.

caixa_transporte.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Caixa de transporte” in the atelier. Show a wooden art transport crate leaning against the back wall of the restoration room, in a position that looks slightly out of place. The crate has a false bottom panel that sits a little unevenly, hinting that something is hidden inside. Warm light from a desk lamp falls across the wood grain, while brushes and pigment pots appear softly blurred around it. Composition: square medium close-up, the crate is the clear focal point, with realistic wood texture and the uneven false-bottom panel visible. Mood: quiet, suspicious, ordinary, investigative. Important visual clues: wooden crate, false bottom panel, out-of-place position, desk lamp light.

pincel_sonia.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Pincel de Sônia” on the workbench in the atelier. Show a single fine paint brush lying on a stained cloth, its tip still wet with pigment whose color matches the palette of the forgery now hanging in the gallery. Around it, softly blurred, are other brushes, small pots of paint, and a magnifying loupe. A warm desk lamp lights the bristles, making the wet pigment gleam. Composition: square close-up still life, the wet brush is the clear focal point, with realistic bristle and pigment detail. Mood: calm, suspicious, investigative, refined. Important visual clues: wet brush, matching pigment, workbench context, desk lamp.

otavio.prompt: Create a character portrait for Otávio, owner of Galeria Sereno. Otávio is a Brazilian adult man in his late 50s. He is refined, methodical, proud of his gallery’s reputation, and visibly shaken after discovering that the Vertigem has been swapped for a forgery. He wants to recover the original without turning the case into a public scandal. Appearance: elegant veteran gallerist, calm intelligent eyes, neat silver hair, small reading glasses, a dark tailored jacket or blazer with a thin scarf. His expression is measured, serious, alert, and quietly hurt. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the gallery softly blurred behind him, with white walls, gilded frames, and warm spotlight on one side of his face. He should look human, believable, emotionally grounded, and not villainous. Mood: restrained authority, professional pride, quiet worry, careful observation.

sonia.prompt: Create a character portrait for Sônia, the restorer at Galeria Sereno. Sônia is a Brazilian adult woman in her early 40s. She is dedicated, sensitive, and visibly nervous after the discovery of the swap, clearly afraid of being blamed. She is the true culprit but not a villain: she acted out of a misguided sense of protection, not greed. Appearance: experienced restorer, practical clothing, a linen apron or work shirt stained with faint pigment, hair tied back but slightly loose after a long night. Her hands may fidget near a brush or the edge of her apron. Her expression is anxious, earnest, defensive, and trying hard to appear calm. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the restoration atelier softly blurred behind her, with warm desk-lamp light, teal shadows, and brushes in the background. She should look human, vulnerable, and morally complex rather than obviously guilty. Mood: nervous innocence, vulnerability, hidden guilt, principled discomfort.

dante.prompt: Create a character portrait for Dante, an experienced art collector. Dante is a Brazilian adult man in his early 50s. He is calm, articulate, and slightly self-assured. He came to the gallery to evaluate the Vertigem and made a low offer that Otávio accepted. He is innocent of the swap, but he knows he is the obvious suspect and uses openness as a shield. Appearance: refined adult collector, tasteful outfit, an elegant coat or tailored jacket, a subtle vintage watch, well-groomed hair, confident posture. His expression is composed, slightly raised chin, guarded but cooperative eyes, a faint polite smile. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the gallery softly blurred behind him, with white walls, gilded frames, and warm spotlights. He should look sophisticated, believable, and socially polished rather than threatening. Mood: confident elegance, social control, restrained defensiveness, calm honesty.

full_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the full truth ending of “O Quadro Trocado”. Show the main wall of Galeria Sereno after the mystery is resolved. The heavy gilded frame now holds the true Vertigem, restored to its place, with the correct paint texture and even varnish catching the spotlight as it should. On a dark mahogany bench nearby, the discarded forgery canvas rests face-down, no longer needed as a disguise. The art transport crate from the atelier sits closed against the side wall, its false bottom no longer in use. The atmosphere feels calmer, warmer, and more reflective, with golden spotlight glow and soft teal shadows. Composition: wide horizontal image, no people, focus on the restored original in its frame and the discarded forgery as symbols of resolution. Mood: reflective, resolved, bittersweet, elegant, literary.

partial_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the partial truth ending of “O Quadro Trocado”. Show the main wall of Galeria Sereno with the gilded frame still holding the forgery, the true Vertigem still missing. The art transport crate and the atelier appear softly blurred at the edges of the image, surrounded by deeper shadows and uncertainty, suggesting that part of the truth was uncovered but the original was not recovered. The gallery remains warm and elegant, but the borders of the image are darker and less resolved. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the framed forgery on the wall, with deeper shadows around the frame. No characters. Mood: ambiguous, elegant, unresolved, quiet discomfort.

wrong_accusation.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the wrong accusation ending of “O Quadro Trocado”. Show the interior of Galeria Sereno after the morning, with the gilded frame still holding the forgery on the main wall. The true Vertigem is still missing and the truth has not been found. Other framed works on the side walls remain lit by their spotlights, indifferent to what was lost. The lighting is warm but heavier with shadows, and the atmosphere suggests that the real culprit walked away unnoticed. The scene should feel quietly regretful and unresolved, without becoming scary. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the framed forgery slightly off-center on the wall, surrounded by other works and soft shadows, no characters. Mood: unresolved, quiet, regretful, elegant, literary.
